title: Query produces different results after disabling some optimization rules
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT NOT NULL, c3 VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t3(c4 FLOAT, c5 DATE NOT NULL);
SELECT t2.c1, t3.c4 FROM t2 LEFT JOIN t3 ON t2.c1 = CAST(t3.c4 AS INTEGER) WHERE t3.c5 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Disabling optimization rules affects query results
